description: Deed of sale (שטר זביני). Very damaged. Dating: early 11th century. One of the parties is David. The deed is signed by Yosef b. [...], Shelomo b. Aharon ha-Kohen, at least one other Shelomo, and [Sa]ʿadya b. Avr[aham?]. and the qiyyum is signed by Yiṣḥaq b. Khalfa and Elḥanan (b. Shemarya). AA/ASE/YG
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
